case_title: PATEL, D M vs. FLETCHER, GERARD et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES AS TO DEFENDANT FLETCHER, GERARD

#3 CHAITIN--REPORTER DANIELLE ADIBZADEH--CC FOR SETT CONF. ALL PRESENT. STIPULATED SETTLEMENT REACHED AS FOLLOWS--- DEF WILL VACATE PREMISES ON SEPT 3, 1993 AND PLTF WILL PAY DEF $200.00 TODAY AND PLTF WILL VACATE JUDGMT AND DEBT VS DEF AND GIVE DEF GOOD REFERENCE IF DEF VACATES ON TIME. ALL PRESENT AGREE TO THIS SETTLEMENT. PLTF IS TO PREPARE PAPERS.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FLETCHER, GERARD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 310 COLUMBUS AVENUE, #105, SF, CA, STAYED UNTIL SEP-03-1993, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH FOR ALL CONDITIONS.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
